root: ^Hi, I'm Pemmy the pemming! I might even be a penguin.
^I like strawberries, walking to the right and eating fish, probably.
^I like hiding in sockets, sticking my face into electrical outlets and eating fish.
^Wow, we have so much in common!
^It sounds like we have one thing in common, and that was a 'probably' at best.
^I bet if I keep walking to the right we'll be able to meet up!
